input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.4.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.4.5.1
            TITLE: the insulation resistance between the tractive system and glv system ground will be

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.4.5.1: The insulation resistance between the Tractive System and GLV System Ground will be
IN.4.5.1 The insulation resistance between the Tractive System and GLV System Ground will be 
measured.

final_answer: The insulation resistance between the Tractive System and GLV System Ground will be measured.
